title: Termination of the accreditation of the Securities Dealer's Representative Licence of Mr. Matthew Sai Leung Choi (SDR188)
text: The Financial Services Authority (“FSA/Authority”) hereby gives notice to the general public, pursuant Section 4(1)(m) of the Financial Services Authority Act, 2013 (“FSA Act”), the accreditation of Mr. Matthew Sai Leung Choi as the Representative of NAGM(S) Limited has been terminated, effective as of January 23rd, 2026.
